title: Wonderfully Wholesome Indian Potatoes Bhaji Pav
description: Smoky, snappy, energizing Indian dish featuring baking powder, robata-grill, ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly. Formed as Pav-Bhaji.
instructions: Grill the potatoes, onion, and tomato on robata-grill until smoky and slightly charred.
Boil the potatoes, onion, and tomato in a pot of water until tender.
In a blender or food processor, blend the grilled or boiled potatoes, onion, and tomato into a coarse paste.
In a pan, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
Add the baking powder, cumin powder, and salt to the pan and stir for 1 minute.
Add the blended potato mixture to the pan and stir for 2 minutes.
Add the green chili, garlic, and cilantro to the pan and stir for 1 minute.
Add the lime juice to the pan and stir for 1 minute.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the Bhaji for 5 minutes.
Split the pav into 8 pieces and grill or toast until lightly browned.
Serve the Bhaji with the toasted pav.
